business_ideas.idea: Lead gen for apartments (Supper.com); $10 per qualified email.
Lead gen for senior living facilities ($1000+ per qualified lead).
Lead gen for truck driver recruitment (high CPM possible).
Lead gen for local home services (landscaping, irrigation).
Lead gen for jobs (Rigup model; $100+ per oil worker lead).
Credit Karma model: credit reports then credit card affiliate fees.
NerdWallet: financial comparison lead gen at scale.
Penny Hoarder: money saving advice monetized via affiliate fees.
Thumbtack: marketplace connecting service providers with customers.
Manzil: Halal/Islamic mortgage financing via marketplace model.
Challenger bank layer on top of BBVA (Simple, Brex model).
Robin Hood: invest in getting banking charter to compete.

predictions.text: Lead gen margins are 60-70% if done well; highly profitable.
Supper.com raised $40M at $400M valuation for lead gen model.
Fluent Media (lead gen) competed against Penny Hoarder via copy.
Islamic financing has massive TAM but needs VC education.
First banking charter granted after decade; competitive floodgates opening.
